class.name: GameInputReading
class.brief_description: Per-frame snapshot of a gamepad's state.
class.description: [GameInputReading] is an immutable snapshot of a single device's gamepad state, captured at the moment [method GameInput.get_current_reading] was called. It holds both the current and previous-poll states so [method was_button_pressed] and [method was_button_released] can return correct edge transitions across the most recent real refresh (driven by [method GameInput.poll]). Edge methods only fire when there is a previous-frame state to compare against; on the very first reading after a device connects, [method was_button_pressed] reports [code]true[/code] for buttons that are currently down (treated as a fresh press) and [method was_button_released] reports [code]false[/code].

method.name: is_button_down
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param button] (a [enum GameInputDevice.Button] flag value or any [int] matching the underlying buttons bitmask) is currently held. Use this for "while held" checks; use [method was_button_pressed] for one-shot triggers.

method.name: was_button_pressed
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] only on the press edge of [param button] — that is, the button was up in the previous reading and is down now. Returns [code]false[/code] for unknown button values. On the first reading after a device connects (no previous state yet), this falls back to "currently down".

method.name: was_button_released
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] only on the release edge of [param button] — that is, the button was down in the previous reading and is up now. Returns [code]false[/code] when there is no previous-frame state to compare against, or when [param button] is unknown.

method.name: get_axis
method.description: Returns the value of [param axis] (a [enum GameInputDevice.Axis] index). Thumbstick axes are returned in [code][-1.0, 1.0][/code]; trigger axes are returned in [code][0.0, 1.0][/code]. The Y axes are sign-flipped from the native [code]GameInputGamepadState[/code] to match Godot's convention (down is positive). Returns [code]0.0[/code] for unknown axis ids.

method.name: get_buttons_mask
method.description: Returns the raw current-frame buttons bitfield. The bit layout matches the native [code]GameInputGamepadButtons[/code] flags, which is also what the [enum GameInputDevice.Button] constants encode. Useful for batch comparisons or serialization.

method.name: get_timestamp
method.description: Reserved for a future revision that surfaces [code]IGameInputReading::GetTimestamp()[/code]. The current implementation always returns [code]0[/code] because readings are snapshotted per frame rather than per native event.
